## Description
Brief description of what this PR does. Link any related issues.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Style/refactor (no functional changes)

## Testing
- [ ] Tested on Android emulator (API 28+)
- [ ] Tested on iOS simulator (iOS 14+)
- [ ] Tested on physical device
- [ ] Tested dark mode
- [ ] Tested responsive layouts (360px, 390px, 414px, 768px)
- [ ] Tested with different network speeds

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] `dart analyze lib` passes (no issues)
- [ ] `dart format lib` applied
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded strings (uses localization)
- [ ] No hardcoded colors (uses theme)
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met (48x48dp targets, 4.5:1 contrast, semantic labels)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if needed)
